name: hermes_agent
description: A bridge agent that delegates tasks to Hermes AI Agent (NousResearch).
Hermes is an autonomous self-improving agent with 60+ tools, web search,
browser automation, image generation, and persistent memory.
Use this agent for complex autonomous tasks that benefit from Hermes capabilities.

role.strengths: Best for web scraping, browser automation, image generation, web research. Has 60+ built-in tools.
